prose.en: Downgrade system media containing controlled unclassified information prior to public release.

guidance.en: The downgrading of controlled unclassified information uses approved sanitization tools, techniques, and procedures.

prose.en: system media containing controlled unclassified information is identified;
system media containing controlled unclassified information is downgraded prior to public release.

objects.en: procedures addressing downgrading of media containing CUI
applicable federal and organizational standards and policies regarding protection of CUI
Organizational personnel with system media downgrading responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing media downgrading
